title: Taxanthema mucronatum
taxonomy: Taxanthema mucronatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It belongs to the order Malpighiales. The plant is further classified into the family Euphorbiaceae, subfamily Euphorbioideae, and tribe Euphorbieae. Within this family, the genus Taxanthema is also recognized. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships.
